shell.phaseBlurb: This route is scaffolded and ready. The full editorial experience lands in Phase {phase}.

about.metaDescription: ABRIEV is a curated automotive marketplace — built around trust, design, and clarity.
about.title: A quieter way to buy, sell, and drive.
about.description: ABRIEV was built for people who care about how a marketplace reads, not just what it lists. An editorial house for automotive commerce.

faqs.metaDescription: Answers on buying, renting, listing, and dealer services on ABRIEV.
faqs.title: Frequently asked questions.
faqs.description: Questions on buying, renting, listing, and dealer services — organized with editorial clarity in Phase 3.

privacy.metaDescription: How ABRIEV handles personal data and cookies.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy.
privacy.description: Transparent handling of personal data, cookies, and analytics. Full copy arrives in Phase 5.

terms.metaDescription: The legal framework for using the ABRIEV marketplace.
terms.title: Terms of Service.
terms.description: The legal framework governing use of the ABRIEV marketplace. Full copy arrives in Phase 5.

copyright.metaDescription: Copyright and intellectual property notice for ABRIEV.
copyright.title: Copyright.
copyright.description: DMCA, takedown procedures, and intellectual property notice. Full copy arrives in Phase 5.

refundPolicy.metaDescription: Refund terms for bookings and marketplace services.
refundPolicy.title: Refund Policy.
refundPolicy.description: Refund terms for bookings, reservations, and marketplace services. Full copy arrives in Phase 5.

dealers.metaDescription: Verified ABRIEV dealer directory — inventory quality and editorial fit.
dealers.title: A network of verified dealers.
dealers.description: Every dealer on ABRIEV is vetted for inventory quality, service integrity, and editorial fit. Browse by region and specialty in Phase 3.

dealerDetail.metaDescription: Dealer profile and inventory on ABRIEV.
dealerDetail.title: Dealer
dealerDetail.description: Dealer hero, profile, contact, inventory feed, and credibility markers arrive in Phase 3.

temporaryReplacement.metaDescription: Courtesy vehicles during repairs or claims — coordinated with ABRIEV partners.
temporaryReplacement.title: Temporary car replacement.
temporaryReplacement.description: Courtesy wheels and bridging coverage during repairs or claims—coordinated here with partners. Scheduling and eligibility go live in Phase 5.

carInsuranceAssistance.metaDescription: Guidance and paperwork support for automotive insurance.
carInsuranceAssistance.title: Car insurance assistance.
carInsuranceAssistance.description: Partnership-linked guidance, paperwork checklists, and claims coaching so insurance never feels opaque. Detailed flows land in Phase 5.

dashboard.metaDescription: Your ABRIEV workspace — listings, bookings, and profile.
dashboard.title: Your workspace.
dashboard.description: Restrained dashboard shell with listings, bookings, favorites, and profile sections. Arrives in Phase 4.

dashboardFavorites.title: Your favorites.
dashboardFavorites.description: Saved vehicle grid with quick actions arrives in Phase 4.

dashboardListings.title: Your listings.
dashboardListings.description: Listings table, filtering, and edit flows arrive in Phase 4.

dashboardBookings.title: Your bookings.
dashboardBookings.description: Bookings timeline and status tracking arrive in Phase 4.

dashboardProfile.title: Your profile.
dashboardProfile.description: Profile form, preferences, and account controls arrive in Phase 4.

listYourVehicle.title: List your vehicle.
listYourVehicle.description: Step-based listing flow — photos, details, pricing, review — arrives in Phase 4.

listPricing.metaDescription: Plans and pricing for listing on ABRIEV.
listPricing.title: Listing pricing.
listPricing.description: Plan comparison and upgrade path arrive in Phase 4.

listSuccess.title: Your listing is in review.
listSuccess.description: Editorial confirmation screen with next-steps guidance arrives in Phase 4.

bookingAvailability.metaDescription: Choose a time for your ABRIEV booking.
bookingAvailability.title: Check availability.
bookingAvailability.description: Date selection, time slot, and location confirmation arrive in Phase 4.

bookingCheckout.title: Review & confirm.
bookingCheckout.description: Booking summary, trust messaging, and payment handoff arrive in Phase 4.

bookingConfirmation.title: You're confirmed.
bookingConfirmation.description: Editorial confirmation with itinerary, policy, and dealer contact arrives in Phase 4.
